name: Guizhou Tyre Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guizhou Tyre Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells tires in China. It offers passenger car tires; light truck and urban rail transit tires; tires for engineering, agricultural, and forestry machineries; industrial vehicle tires; and mining tires. It also exports its products to approximately 120 countries and regions, such as the United Kingdom, Italy, South Africa, and South America. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Guiyang, China.
